EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control additional properties and methods for projected coordinate systems.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A690307D-6C11-43A1-966A-9E8DB0672033")]
public interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem2 : IProjectedCoordinateSystem, ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo
